ddls:
CREATE TABLE "job_postings" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job posting */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Title of the job */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Salary information associated with the job */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company posting the job */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the job */,
  "is_remote" INTEGER /* Indicates if the job is remote */,
  "job_rating" REAL /* Rating of the job based on user feedback */,
  "job_summary" TEXT /* Summary of job responsibilities and requirements */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date when the job was posted */,
  "extract_date" TEXT /* Date when the job data was extracted */,
  "job_url" TEXT /* URL to the job posting */,
  "job_category" INTEGER /* Reference to the job category */,
  "work_type" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of job location */,
  "experience_level" TEXT /* Level of experience required */,
  "education_requirement" TEXT /* Minimum educational qualification required */,
  "skills_required" TEXT /* List of required skills for the job */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits offered by the company */,
  "application_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for submitting job applications */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the job posting is currently active */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of times the job posting has been viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_job_category FOREIGN KEY ("job_category") REFERENCES job_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_work_type FOREIGN KEY ("work_type") REFERENCES job_location_types ("location_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the company operates */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for job inquiries */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the company */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "specialties" TEXT /* Specialties or areas of expertise of the company */,
  "mission_statement" TEXT /* Company's mission statement */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the company */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the company's profile is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., job seeker, employer) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "date_registered" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES application_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job application */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job being applied for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user submitting the application */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was submitted */,
  "status" INTEGER /* Current status of the application */,
  "resume_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's resume */,
  "cover_letter_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's cover letter */,
  "application_source" TEXT /* Source from which the application was submitted */,
  "interview_rounds" INTEGER /* Number of interview rounds the candidate has completed */,
  "last_contact_date" TEXT /* Date of the last contact with the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_applications_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES application_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_applications_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_applications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job rating */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the rating */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Rating value (e.g., from 1 to 5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_ratings_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the job category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_location_types" (
  "location_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the location type */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of job location (e.g., remote, onsite) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the application status (e.g., pending, accepted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job posting related to the statistics */,
  "total_applications" INTEGER /* Total number of applications received for the job */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the job posting */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of times the job posting has been viewed */,
  "applications_per_day" REAL /* Average number of applications per day */,
  "time_to_hire" INTEGER /* Average time to hire (in days) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_statistics_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("job_id")
)
